description: Verify the iOS app launches and shows the branding logo.
steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Observe the splash/landing screen
expected_result: Branding logo is visible on screen.
actual_result: App launched successfully, branding logo visible.

description: Verify Username and Password input fields are present and visible.
steps:
1. Open application to Login screen
2. Inspect UI components
expected_result: Both input fields are displayed and interactive.

description: Submit login form with empty input fields.
steps:
1. Leave fields empty
2. Tap Login button
expected_result: An alert/warning message is displayed indicating required fields.

description: Attempt login with invalid doctor license and password.
steps:
1. Enter invalid doctor ID
2. Enter incorrect password
3. Tap Login button
expected_result: Error banner is displayed with 'Invalid credentials' message.

description: Log in to the app using valid doctor credentials.
steps:
1. Enter valid license ID
2. Enter correct password
3. Tap Login
expected_result: Successful login and redirection to the Main Dashboard.
actual_result: Logged in and redirected to Dashboard successfully.

description: Verify module selection cards (Breast, Lungs, Thyroid) are present.
steps: 1. View the main dashboard tab
expected_result: All module cards are displayed correctly in a grid/list.
actual_result: Breast, Lungs, and Thyroid modules are visible in the grid.

description: Search for a patient using their unique patient ID.
steps:
1. Tap Search Bar
2. Input patient ID 'PT020'
expected_result: The patient matching the search query is displayed in results.

description: Add a new patient record with name, age, and gender details.
steps:
1. Tap Add Patient icon
2. Fill name, age, and select gender
3. Tap Save
expected_result: Success toast appears and new patient record is registered.
actual_result: New patient added, success toast displayed.

description: Verify detailed patient profile displays correctly.
steps: 1. Tap on a patient from the list
expected_result: Redirection to patient profile showing history and metadata.
actual_result: Patient profile loaded with matching details.

description: Verify navigation to the Breast cancer module from the dashboard.
steps: 1. Tap Breast card on dashboard
expected_result: Navigates to the Breast screening page.

description: Verify text fields and dropdowns for Breast IHC markers accept input.
steps:
1. Input '70' for ER%
2. Input '60' for PR%
3. Choose '3+' for HER2
expected_result: IHC marker input fields correctly display the entered values.

description: Calculate total screening score for the Breast module.
steps: 1. Tap Calculate Score button after inputs
expected_result: Allred score and IHC classification is displayed correctly.

description: Input Lungs screening markers (PD-L1 TPS%).
steps:
1. Navigate to Lungs module
2. Enter '45' in PD-L1 field
expected_result: Lungs IHC fields display the typed value.

description: Calculate total score and oncology inference for Lungs.
steps: 1. Tap Calculate Score button
expected_result: Inference label shows correct classification based on inputs.

description: Input Thyroid screening markers (Galectin-3, CK19).
steps:
1. Navigate to Thyroid module
2. Choose Positive for Galectin-3
expected_result: Thyroid marker values are correctly registered.

description: Input Head & Neck screening markers (p16).
steps:
1. Navigate to Head & Neck module
2. Select Positive for p16
expected_result: Head & Neck marker values are correctly selected.

description: Input Soft Tissue screening markers (MDM2).
steps:
1. Navigate to Soft Tissue module
2. Choose MDM2 status
expected_result: Soft Tissue marker values are correctly set.

description: Generate clinical diagnostic PDF report for patient.
steps:
1. Tap Generate PDF button
2. Verify the PDF viewer screen launches
expected_result: PDF preview window is loaded displaying the compiled medical report.
actual_result: PDF generated and displayed on screen.

description: Navigate to Doctor settings screen and verify layout.
steps:
1. Tap Profile Tab on tab bar
2. Inspect details
expected_result: Doctor profile showing license number and hospital details is shown.
actual_result: Settings loaded correctly, Doctor profile details verified.

description: Log out from the doctor profile and return to the Login screen.
steps:
1. Tap Logout button
2. Confirm logout dialog
expected_result: Session is cleared, redirected back to Login screen.
actual_result: Logged out and returned to login screen successfully.
